channel.title: Привет, Русский!
channel.description: Learn Russian with Olya! A bilingual podcast for English speakers — kids and adult beginners. Each episode teaches vocabulary, phrases, and culture through fun, themed lessons.
channel.itunes:author: Nerra Network
channel.itunes:summary: Learn Russian with Olya! A bilingual podcast for English speakers — kids and adult beginners. Each episode teaches vocabulary, phrases, and culture through fun, themed lessons. Привет means hello. Let's learn together!
